ZhHans: 以寿元为火，以五行为刃。
column4: wield the five elements as your blade.

ZhHans: 五行灵根构筑，决定你这一局能走多远。
En: Build around elemental roots and decide how far this run can go.

ZhHans: 自动战斗，策略重心放在配装、路线与功法取舍。
En: Auto battles keep the focus on loadouts

ZhHans: 寿元会随着推进不断流逝，每一步都在逼近终局。
column4: and every step pushes you closer to the end.

ZhHans: 进入主菜单后可继续推进地图、战斗与构筑。
En: Enter the main menu to continue your route

ZhHans: 第一阶段 / 第一步 / 文字与线框 UGUI
En: Phase 1 / Step 1 / Text and line UGUI

ZhHans: 这一版先只用文字、线条和矩形框，方便后续替换美术。
En: This version uses text lines and rectangles first so art can be replaced later.

ZhHans: 战斗配置缺失，请先导入全部 CSV。
En: Battle config missing. Import all CSV files first.

ZhHans:
角色甲  HP 120/120
角色乙  HP 150/150
En:
Unit A  HP 120/120
Unit B  HP 150/150

ZhHans:
敌人甲  HP 100/100
敌人乙  HP 90/90
En:
Enemy A  HP 100/100
Enemy B  HP 90/90

ZhHans: 下一步这里会接真实战斗日志。
En: This area will show real battle logs in the next step.

ZhHans: 这是第一阶段的 UGUI 框架，后面可以把这些线框替换成正式美术。
En: This popup is part of the first-phase UGUI framework. These boxes can be replaced by final art later.

ZhHans: 下一步会接入真正的战斗系统。
En: The real battle system will be connected next.

ZhHans: 该功能仅在Unity编辑器中可用。
En: This feature is only available in the Unity Editor.
Lifespan exhausted. The run has ended.

ZhHans: 本轮路线完成，返回主菜单。
En: Route complete. Returning to main menu.

ZhHans: 建议：如果预估不理想，先调整装备再开战。
En: Tip: Adjust equipment before battle if the preview looks risky.
The destination event has been triggered.

ZhHans: 选择你在此地如何调整状态。
En: Choose how to spend this stop.

ZhHans:
借阅藏经
获得 1 次功法机缘
En:
Borrow Scripture
Gain 1 skill reward choice

ZhHans: 离开新手村前，选择一份启程助力。
En: Before leaving the village, choose one piece of support.

ZhHans: 你在附近采集五行灵石，囊中收获更丰。
En: You gather the local five-element crystals and leave with fuller pockets.

ZhHans: 你手中的对应灵石不足，暂时无法进行这次炼化。
En: You do not have enough matching spirit stones to refine this stop.

ZhHans: 你将储备灵石当场炼化，强行换来一段更猛的修为推进。
En: You refine stored spirit stones into pure progress and push your cultivation further.

ZhHans: 你整理装备与气机，为下一段路做足准备。
En: You sort equipment and steady your rhythm before moving on.

ZhHans: 你专心调息运转周天，修为更进一步。
En: You focus on breathing practice and deepen your cultivation.

ZhHans: 路过行商给你留下一份赶路所需的修行补给。
En: A passing merchant leaves you a small bundle of cultivation supplies.

ZhHans: 临行前，村中长者给了你几句修行指点。
En: The village elder gives you a few words of guidance before you set out.

ZhHans: 选择一项开局功法机缘。
你整理思绪后，轻装上路。
En: You leave the village with a clearer mind.

ZhHans: 你从村中藏经阁借得一页功法残卷。
En: You borrow a manual from the village archive.

ZhHans: 你在本轮途中寿元耗尽。当前局将结束，并返回主界面。
En: Your lifespan has run out during this journey. The current run will end and return to the main menu.

ZhHans: 立刻触发休整事件，并停留在地图上。
En: Trigger rest immediately and stay on the map.

ZhHans: 移动结束后自动进入战斗。
En: Start battle automatically after movement ends.
